fields.label: Domain
fields.description: The wildcard zone, e.g. blr1.frappe.dev. The issued cert is *.<domain>.

fields.label: Region
fields.description: The proxy fleet this domain fronts. Join key to Virtual Machine.region (is_proxy=1). Denormalized from Atlas Settings.region at insert (the single source of truth) — the operator does not type it; switching the instance region never re-points an existing domain's region.

fields.label: DNS Provider Type
fields.description: DNS vendor that owns the zone (DNS-01 challenge). Denormalized from Atlas Settings.dns_provider_type at insert; the DNS registry keys off it.

fields.label: TLS Provider Type
fields.description: Issuer that produces the wildcard certificate. Denormalized from Atlas Settings.tls_provider_type at insert; the TLS registry keys off it.
